heading: Role of Chairman of Joint Chiefs of Staff
label: 163 Role of Chairman of Joint Chiefs of Staff

children.heading: .—Communications Through Chairman of JCS; Assignment of Duties
children.label: a .—Communications Through Chairman of JCS; Assignment of Duties

children.text: direct that communications between the President or the Secretary of Defense and the commanders of the unified and specified combatant commands be transmitted through the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff; and
assign duties to the Chairman to assist the President and the Secretary of Defense in performing their command function.

children.heading: .—Oversight by Chairman of Joint Chiefs of Staff
children.label: b .—Oversight by Chairman of Joint Chiefs of Staff

children.text: The Secretary of Defense may assign to the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff responsibility for overseeing the activities of the combatant commands. Such assignment by the Secretary to the Chairman does not confer any command authority on the Chairman and does not alter the responsibility of the commanders of the combatant commands prescribed in .section 164(b)(2) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: confer with and obtain information from the commanders of the combatant commands with respect to the requirements of their commands;

children.label: C
children.text: advise and make recommendations to the Secretary of Defense with respect to the requirements of the combatant commands, individually and collectively; and

children.label: D
children.text: communicate, as appropriate, the requirements of the combatant commands to other elements of the Department of Defense.
